headline: A Look At Charles River Laboratories (CRL) Valuation After Recent Share Price Weakness
summary: Recent share performance and business snapshot Charles River Laboratories International (CRL) has drawn attention after a period of weak share performance, including a return of about negative 22% over the past 3 months and negative 21% year to date. At a last close of US$159.16 and a market value of about US$7.8b, the contract research specialist continues to generate annual revenue of roughly US$4.0b, alongside a reported net loss of about US$144.3m.
